message:
Add test coverage: OpenAI provider_options and reasoning_tokens

Task 16 (spec 8.2): verifies that provider_options.openai fields are
merged into the request body.
Task 17 (spec 8.5): verifies that reasoning_tokens does not pollute
output_tokens count.

Note: Task 15 (Anthropic Retry-After) was already added by another agent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
